prestazioni: Engine: FB25D (2.5L DOHC AVCS naturally aspirated) - Full forged internals including Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 8,500 RPM redline capability, paired with a Tomei 272°/272° camshaft kit with adjustable vernier pulleys for aggressive overlap tuning.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe (Cobb Tuning) and a PTP 3.5" catless front pipe, mated to a Grimmspeed 3-port EBCS and a custom-tuned Cobb Accessport (Stage 3+ map) targeting 320 WHP on E85 with a 22 PSI peak boost spike.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual transmission with a PPG short shifter, STI Group N transmission mount, and a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (2.5:1 final drive ratio), paired with a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily organic/ceramic hybrid disc and a Fidanza lightweight flywheel (11.8 lbs).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 Forester widebody kit (polyurethane fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 2, 50% weight reduction), paired with a Cusco rear wing (200mm chord, 3° adjustable angle).

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/20mm rear drop) with Cusco front and rear pillowball upper mounts, Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and Hardrace front camber plates (3° negative camber adjustment).

Wheels/Tires: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +38 front, 18x10.5 +42 rear) with Yokohama Advan A052 tires (255/35/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), paired with DBA 5000 Series rotors (2-piece slotted) and Project Mu B-Max 999 brake pads (front) and Brembo GT rear calipers.
